message:
feat(policy): Implement policy model with ActionKind, PolicyDecision, authorize() API

- Add ActionKind enum with 18 action variants (SendText, SendCtrlC, Spawn, etc.)
- Add ActorKind enum (Human, Robot, Mcp, Workflow)
- Add PolicyDecision enum (Allow, Deny, RequireApproval) with serde support
- Add PolicyInput struct with builder pattern for authorization requests
- Add PaneCapabilities for tracking pane state (prompt, running, reserved)
- Implement RateLimiter for per-pane action throttling
- Implement PolicyEngine::authorize() with rate limiting, reservation checks,
  prompt validation, and destructive action approval requirements
- Add 20+ comprehensive unit tests covering all policy scenarios

Closes: wa-4vx.8.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
